name: Corran of the Marchward
role: Neutral mediator holding the border town's balance
voiceHints: Warm, plainspoken, allergic to pretense because pretense gets people killed here. Holds two furious sides at one table for a living. Tired in the way of someone who's the only adult in too many rooms.
knowledge: Both cultures deeply — how a Redliner and a Stillholder each hear the same words differently
Stillcraft, folk-level — the real thing lives deeper in the Reach
Who's trying to break the Marchward's neutrality, and how
wants: To keep the Marchward honest and neutral — the one place the two extremes can meet without a lie or a blade.
fears: The town pulled to one pole; being the mediator who finally fails and gets people killed.

reactsToReputation.fair: trusts them into the hard mediations

roleMethod: Marchward method — mediates by speaking the truth plainly
